items.name_en: 【Celebrity Favorite】🔥Soft Nappa Leather Flamenco Purse New Clutch 👜The Flamenco Purse features a pleated design 💄with key details like the signature knot on the side. Stylish and versatile 😍Can be carried as a clutch 🧸or worn with the donut ⛓chain as a shoulder bag or with the leather strap as a crossbody. 👛This version is made of soft Nappa leather. *Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Removable adjustable leather strap *Removable donut chain with Anagram embossed pebbled texture* Discreet magnetic closure *Suede lining* 🫶🏼L💋EWE Gold or Silver Plating🩷

items.name_en: LO℮w℮🌟New Arrival Denim Amazona 23 Cropped Handbag *Bowling Bag 🎳 Latest Size🆕
items.name_cn:
LO℮w℮🌟New Arrival Denim Amazona 23 Cropped Handbag *Bowling Bag 🎳 Latest Size🆕
Born in the 1970s, the Amazona handbag is reimagined in a long baguette proportion, continuing the iconic Amazona logo. This version is made of denim, fully decorated with a kitten pattern. Louis Wain's Futurrist Cats ceramic vase series.*Equipped with a small padlock as a new icon 🔒to match the modern lifestyle where devices are often stored in the bag*And the design is updated with double zippers for easy opening and closing*Tubular leather handle and vintage bag corner details*Can be crossbody, on the shoulder, or handheld *The compact shape exudes a playful academic style.
Model: 062417
Size: 23*10*11CM
